listings.title: JDA Approved Plot - Mahal Road, Jagatpura
listings.desc: Residential plot in an established pocket near NRI Colony. Immediate possession.

ai_report.recommendation: Buy only if JDA approved; avoid society patches. It's the most liquid asset in Jaipur right now, but you're paying a premium for 'hype'.
ai_report.infra: Direct benefit from Sanganer Elevated road and upcoming Jhalana Bypass three-tier transit.
ai_report.catalysts: Proximity to Bombay Hospital and Airport expansion.
ai_report.civilization: High-end. Schools like Jayshree Periwal nearby. Elite crowd, mostly doctors and HNIs.
ai_report.utilities: Sewerage is decent, but ground water is depleting fast. You will rely on tankers or Bisalpur connection (if lucky).

listings.title: Gated Township Plot - Ajmer Road (Near SEZ)
listings.desc: Plot in a landscaped township with clubhouse facilities near Mahindra SEZ.

ai_report.recommendation: Great for a 5-10 year horizon. Don't expect to live there tomorrow; it's a 'weekend home' zone for now.
ai_report.projections: 18-20% CAGR (High growth potential due to Ring Road).
ai_report.infra: Massive boost from Rs 30,000 Cr highway projects and Delhi-Jaipur Super Expressway connectivity.
ai_report.catalysts: Mahindra SEZ expansion and Ring Road Phase 2 integration.
ai_report.civilization: Emerging. Top schools like Step by Step are operational, but daily shopping requires a car.
ai_report.utilities: Electricity is stable; water is purely borewell-dependent. Sewerage managed by private developers.

listings.title: Industrial/Warehouse Land - Sikar Road (Near Northern Ring Road)
listings.desc: Raw land parcels ideal for logistics or long-term investment near Chimanpura.

ai_report.recommendation: High risk, high reward. Wait for the Northern Ring Road corridor clarity before dumping big capital.
ai_report.infra: NHAI Transport Corridor of Northern Ring Road project is the sole lifeline here.
ai_report.catalysts: Shifting of heavy transport hubs outside the main city.
ai_report.civilization: Low. Industrial vibe. Not suitable for families yet.
ai_report.utilities: Basic electricity; zero public sewerage; industrial-grade water issues.

listings.title: Residential Plot - Tonk Road (Shivdaspura Area)
listings.desc: Affordable plots near the Ring Road junction. Future growth corridor.

ai_report.recommendation: The 'Poor Man's Jagatpura' that won't stay poor for long. Buy before the Metro Phase 2 extension kicks in.
ai_report.infra: JDA roadmap for Ring Road and Metro extension loan process is the main driver.
ai_report.catalysts: Proposed Satellite Hospital and Cargo Hub proximity.
ai_report.civilization: Moderate. Chokhi Dhani vibe. Rapidly developing coaching hubs nearby.
ai_report.utilities: Government focusing on this belt for organized sewerage under new JDA projects.

listings.title: Premium Plot - Vaishali Nagar Extension
listings.desc: Plots in organized blocks with wide roads and proximity to Gandhi Path West.

ai_report.recommendation: The safest bet for end-users. Prices are sticky and rarely fall even in a slump.
ai_report.infra: Benefit from signal-free zones on Delhi model planned by JDA.
ai_report.catalysts: Saturation of main Vaishali Nagar is pushing all 'Old Money' here.
ai_report.civilization: Excellent. High-end cafes, hospitals (Shalby), and premium gyms.
ai_report.utilities: Best in class for Jaipur, but traffic congestion is becoming a nightmare.

localities.name: Jagatpura
localities.utility_status: Severe water crisis; tanker dependency is 70%. Electricity is reliable. Sewerage is 60% covered.
localities.brutal_truth: It's the 'Whitefield' of Jaipur. Overpriced apartments and dusty roads, but it’s where the jobs and money are. Buy land, not flats, if you want to beat the 65% price surge inflation.

localities.name: Ajmer Road / SEZ
localities.utility_status: Good roads but zero public transport. Water is a private headache. Sewerage is non-existent outside gated townships.
localities.brutal_truth: Investment goldmine, residential graveyard. Great for your portfolio, terrible for your social life. If you buy here, ensure you have two cars and a massive water storage tank.

localities.name: Sikar Road
localities.utility_status: Polluted air due to industries. Water is hard. Frequent power cuts in smaller colonies.
localities.brutal_truth: The North is waking up late. It's messy, industrial, and prone to traffic jams that will make you cry. Only buy here if you are betting on the Northern Ring Road connection.

localities.name: Kalwar Road
localities.utility_status: Lacks organized drainage. Narrow internal roads. Bisalpur water is a distant dream for most.
localities.brutal_truth: The budget trap. Low entry prices lure the middle class, but the lack of planning means you'll be living in a concrete jungle with zero breathing space. Avoid 'Society Patta' here at all costs.

localities.name: Sirsi Road
localities.utility_status: Better than Kalwar but worse than Vaishali. Private water schemes are common. Sewerage is improving.
localities.brutal_truth: Vaishali’s poorer cousin trying to look rich. Good for families, but builders are over-leveraging the 'Vaishali proximity' to charge insane premiums.

localities.name: Tonk Road
localities.utility_status: High-noise zone near airport. Good JDA water supply in older parts. Modern sewerage in new projects.
localities.brutal_truth: The backbone of Jaipur. It's congested and noisy, but it has the best institutional connectivity. If you find a clean JDA title here, grab it—they aren't making more land near the airport.

localities.name: Vaishali Nagar Extension
localities.utility_status: Organized utilities. High maintenance costs. Water is managed but expensive.
localities.brutal_truth: The new status symbol. It’s expensive because everyone wants to say they live in Vaishali. Watch out for forged SEBI/Society documents recently flagged in news.

localities.name: Mansarovar Extension
localities.utility_status: Decent JDA infra. Overcrowding is becoming an issue. Sewerage is mostly functional.
localities.brutal_truth: Safe but boring. It's a solid middle-class destination with stagnant 'vibe' growth. It’s where you buy a house to live in, not to make 2x returns in 3 years.
